helpful: Provisioned petition and brief in opposition exposed the preservation and vehicle issues.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, circuit, relist, and CVSG calibration anchors.
CourtListener opinion search checked the claimed inter-circuit disagreement without seeking the case outcome.
gaps: Corpus query filters are too coarse to retrieve cert priors by legal issue or vehicle defect.
notes: The corpus lookups were most useful for conference-distribution context; CourtListener text search was more useful for issue-specific legal context.
